quickstart.import:
import os
import musiccloud_api_client

configuration = musiccloud_api_client.Configuration()
configuration.api_key['ApiKeyAuth'] = os.environ['MUSICCLOUD_API_KEY']
quickstart.firstRequest:
with musiccloud_api_client.ApiClient(configuration) as client:
    api = musiccloud_api_client.ResolveApi(client)
    result = api.api_v1_resolve_post(
        musiccloud_api_client.ApiV1ResolvePostRequest(
            query='https://open.spotify.com/track/example',
        ),
    )
    print(result)
